title: Page Builder

fields.label: Content Sections
fields.name: cms
fields.instructions: Build your page by adding and arranging content sections below. Each section is a modular layout component that you can customize independently. Drag sections to reorder them, and use the collapse/expand controls to manage your workspace efficiently. Note: When using the Page Builder, the standard WordPress content editor is hidden and the 'Show Page Title' setting in the sidebar is ignored.

sub_fields.label: Hero Title
sub_fields.name: hero_title
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the main heading for the hero section. Use line breaks for multi-line titles.

sub_fields.label: Hero Description
sub_fields.name: hero_description
sub_fields.instructions: Enter the short supporting copy displayed below the hero title.
sub_fields.default_value:
Our focus is simple: deliver better outcomes for our customers,
at a lower total cost of ownership.

sub_fields.label: Buttons
sub_fields.name: hero_buttons
sub_fields.instructions: Add call-to-action buttons. You can add single or multiple buttons.

sub_fields.label: Button Link
sub_fields.name: button_link
sub_fields.instructions: Add button link and text.

sub_fields.label: Media Type
sub_fields.name: hero_media_type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether to display an image or video.

sub_fields.label: Hero Image
sub_fields.name: hero_image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the background image for the hero section.

sub_fields.label: Hero Video
sub_fields.name: hero_video
sub_fields.instructions: Configure the background video for the hero section.

sub_fields.label: Video File
sub_fields.name: video_self_host_file
sub_fields.instructions: Upload MP4 video file.

sub_fields.label: Poster Image
sub_fields.name: video_self_host_poster
sub_fields.instructions: Thumbnail shown before video plays.

sub_fields.label: YouTube URL
sub_fields.name: video_youtube_url
sub_fields.instructions: Enter YouTube video URL.

sub_fields.label: Vimeo MP4 URL
sub_fields.name: video_vimeo_url
sub_fields.instructions: Enter Vimeo MP4 direct URL.

sub_fields.label: Vimeo Poster Image
sub_fields.name: video_vimeo_poster
sub_fields.instructions: Upload a poster image to display before the video plays.

sub_fields.label: CDN Video URL
sub_fields.name: video_cdn_url
sub_fields.instructions: Enter CDN or external video URL.

sub_fields.label: CDN Poster Image
sub_fields.name: video_cdn_poster
sub_fields.instructions: Upload a poster image to display before the video plays.

sub_fields.label: Video Behavior
sub_fields.name: video_behavior
sub_fields.instructions: Choose how the video should behave.

sub_fields.label: Autoplay on Scroll
sub_fields.name: autoplay_on_scroll
sub_fields.instructions: Enable to play video only when scrolled into viewport (saves bandwidth and improves performance).

sub_fields.label: Show Video Controls
sub_fields.name: controls_visibility
sub_fields.instructions: Show custom play/pause and mute/unmute controls for the video.

sub_fields.label: Background Image

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: featured_services_intro_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small uppercase label displayed above the main heading.

sub_fields.label: Services Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: featured_services_intro_services_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small uppercase label displayed above the featured services column.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: featured_services_intro_title
sub_fields.instructions: Main heading. Line breaks are supported.
sub_fields.default_value: Founded to address a growing gap in the IT marketplace, Epaton was created to provide expert, independent guidance in an industry often driven by vendor-led sales.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: featured_services_intro_body
sub_fields.instructions: Supporting copy displayed below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Button
sub_fields.name: featured_services_intro_button
sub_fields.instructions: Optional call-to-action button.

sub_fields.label: Data Source
sub_fields.name: featured_services_intro_source
sub_fields.instructions: Use existing Service posts, or enter manual cards.

sub_fields.label: Services
sub_fields.name: featured_services_intro_services
sub_fields.instructions: Choose Service posts to feature. The service secondary thumbnail is used first, then the featured image.

sub_fields.label: Manual Services
sub_fields.name: featured_services_intro_manual_services
sub_fields.instructions: Add manual featured service cards.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: core_areas_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small label displayed above the heading. Typically uppercase.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: core_areas_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Heading displayed above the core area cards.
sub_fields.default_value: We specialise in three core areas:

sub_fields.name: core_areas_items

sub_fields.name: text
sub_fields.instructions: Card body copy. Line breaks are supported.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: approach_panels_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small uppercase label above the section title.

sub_fields.label: Intro Label
sub_fields.name: approach_panels_intro_label
sub_fields.instructions: Bold label shown before the bullet list.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: approach_panels_title
sub_fields.instructions: Main heading. Line breaks are supported.
sub_fields.default_value: We take time to assess your existing environment, future requirements, and operational challenges before recommending any solution.

sub_fields.label: Approach Bullets
sub_fields.name: approach_panels_bullets
sub_fields.instructions: Short bullet points displayed under the intro label.

sub_fields.label: Statement
sub_fields.name: approach_panels_statement
sub_fields.instructions: Bold statement displayed above the panels.
sub_fields.default_value: We believe strong data infrastructure should enable your organisation — not restrict it.

sub_fields.label: Panels
sub_fields.name: approach_panels_cards
sub_fields.instructions: Add the two bottom panels.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: commitment_panel_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small uppercase label displayed above the heading.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: commitment_panel_title
sub_fields.instructions: Main heading. Line breaks are supported.

sub_fields.label: Intro Label
sub_fields.name: commitment_panel_intro_label
sub_fields.instructions: Bold label shown above the bullet list.

sub_fields.label: Bullet List
sub_fields.name: commitment_panel_bullets
sub_fields.instructions: Add commitment bullet items.

sub_fields.label: Statement
sub_fields.name: commitment_panel_statement
sub_fields.instructions: Bold closing statement below the bullet list. Line breaks are supported.
sub_fields.default_value: We believe strong data infrastructure should enable your organisation - not restrict it.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: looking_forward_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small uppercase label displayed above the copy.

sub_fields.label: Statements

sub_fields.label: Content Source
sub_fields.name: contact_cta_use_global
sub_fields.instructions: By default, this section pulls its content from the global Site Settings > Contact CTA tab. Turn this OFF only if you want to enter custom content for this specific page.
sub_fields.message: Use global content from Site Settings

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: contact_cta_title
sub_fields.instructions: CTA heading. Only used when "Content Source" is set to override the global content.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: contact_cta_body
sub_fields.instructions: Supporting copy. Line breaks are supported. Only used when "Content Source" is set to override the global content.
sub_fields.default_value:
Whether you are reviewing your current platform, planning a major transformation,
or looking to reduce cost and risk, we'd welcome the opportunity to help.

sub_fields.label: Button Style
sub_fields.name: contact_cta_button_style
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the CTA button presentation. Only used when overriding the global content.

sub_fields.label: Button
sub_fields.name: contact_cta_button
sub_fields.instructions: Call-to-action button. Only used when overriding the global content.

sub_fields.label: Section Title
sub_fields.name: contact_panel_section_title
sub_fields.instructions: Large heading displayed above the contact panel.

sub_fields.label: Panel Title
sub_fields.name: contact_panel_title
sub_fields.instructions: Heading displayed above the form inside the blue panel.

sub_fields.label: Form Shortcode
sub_fields.name: contact_panel_form_shortcode
sub_fields.instructions: Contact Form 7 shortcode for the left column form.

We work with a diverse range
of organisations, including:

sub_fields.name: clients_logos_bullets

sub_fields.instructions: Short supporting text below the bullet list.

Many of our clients have worked with us for
years, relying on Epaton as a long-term strategic
backup partner.

sub_fields.label: Client Name

sub_fields.label: Logo

sub_fields.label: Tile Theme
sub_fields.name: theme
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the card background. Blue cards force inline SVG logos white; cyan cards force inline SVG logos black.

sub_fields.label: Logo

description: Flexible content page builder for creating custom page layouts. Build pages using modular, reusable content sections that can be arranged in any order to create unique page designs.
